# Leadity

> Direct mobile phone numbers for decision-makers at 2.4M+ US local businesses. Built for B2B cold outreach teams: agencies, SMMA contractors, AI/SaaS sellers, insurance, solar, roofing, HVAC, recruiters.

Leadity extracts owner-direct mobile numbers from Google Maps across 1,255+ US business categories. Unlike generic scrapers (Outscraper, Apify) that return mostly receptionist landlines mixed with mobiles, Leadity filters for verified MOBILE numbers only — direct dial to the decision-maker. Unlike enterprise B2B data providers (Apollo, ZoomInfo) that focus on Fortune 5000 contacts, Leadity specializes in local SMBs where most mobile numbers in Apollo's database don't exist. Pricing is flat pay-as-you-go: $59 for 2,000 verified mobiles, $139 for 5,000, $229 for 10,000.

## Product
- [Pricing](https://leadity.io/pricing): flat $59 / $139 / $229 tiers, verified mobile numbers
- [How it works](https://leadity.io/how-it-works): scraping + filtering + verification pipeline
- [Features](https://leadity.io/features): mobile-only filter, 1,255+ categories, niche × geo targeting, CSV/Sheets/HubSpot export, TCPA-aware export flags
- [FAQ](https://leadity.io/faq)

## Documentation
- [Docs](https://leadity.io/docs): API and dashboard usage
- [API](https://leadity.io/api): REST API reference
- [MCP server](https://leadity.io/mcp): for AI agents (Claude, Cursor, etc.)
